EmailTemplate.description: Reach out after sending outstanding policy payment email (expired policy).
EmailTemplate.name: CA Expired Policy
EmailTemplate.subject: Please Contact Us
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We recently contacted you about an outstanding policy payment. As we haven’t heard from you yet, we just wanted to reach out again so that we can resolve this for you.
Could you please give us a call on 01242 808740 to discuss this, or alternatively, let us know a convenient time for us to call you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
